_comment: Routed vs shattered units (#68). Routs happen in any battle, so this reuses the bundled showcase. Behaviour change: a routing unit no longer always dies after fleeing — when its rout timer runs out it RALLIES (returns to play, idle, low morale) if it broke contact and kept enough men, otherwise it SHATTERS (removed for good). Whether a given rout rallies depends on the fight, so the clip shows routs resolving rather than a guaranteed rally. Deterministic (positions + counts only).
caption: Routed vs shattered (#68): a routing unit can now RECOVER. When its rout times out it rallies — reforms under your control at low morale — if it broke contact and isn't gutted; otherwise it shatters and is gone for good. Previously every rout simply died after fleeing. (Whether a given rout rallies depends on the battle.) Deterministic: no RNG.
